title: Set Z-axis home position using the Home Offset field
summary: Use the Visu_MDs screen (F2) to enter the previously recorded Z-axis position value into the Home Offset setting for each Z-axis, then confirm each change with UPDATE.
when_to_use: Use during tipper commissioning when the previously recorded Z-axis position values are available and need to be entered as the Home Offset for each Z-axis on the Visu_MDs screen.
not_for: Do not use when the previously recorded Z-axis position values are not available.
Do not use if the Visu_MDs screen, Home Offset setting, New Value column, or UPDATE control is not available as described.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the Visu_MDs screen, enter the recorded Home Offset values for each Z-axis, and confirm each change with UPDATE.

safety_notes: This procedure depends on previously recorded Z-axis position values from the prior procedure.
Stop and escalate if the HMI elements needed for this procedure are not available as described.
access_or_tools_needed: Previously recorded Z-axis position values for each tipper

system_preconditions: Previously recorded Z-axis position values for each tipper are available.

steps.title: Open the Visu_MDs screen
steps.purpose: Access the machine data screen where the Z-axis Home Offset setting can be edited.
steps.instruction: Navigate to the "Visu_MDs" screen using F2.
steps.expected_result: The Visu_MDs screen is displayed and the Home Offset setting area is available for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The Visu_MDs screen opens and shows the machine data fields, including the Home Offset setting and New Value column.
steps.failure_condition: The Visu_MDs screen cannot be opened, or the expected Home Offset and New Value fields are not visible.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall Visu_MDs machine data screen layout for axis parameter editing.
Operator station HMI reference for accessing the Visu_MDs screen using F2.
Screen or nearby artifact support for the Visu_MDs page with Home Offset and UPDATE workflow.
Screen or nearby artifact support for the Visu_MDs page with Home Offset and UPDATE workflow.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Visu_MDs screen is not available.
The Home Offset setting or New Value column is not available as described.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The user is instructed to navigate on the operator station HMI to the "Visu_MDs" screen using F2.

steps.title: Enter the recorded Home Offset value for one Z-axis
steps.purpose: Apply the previously recorded Z-axis position value to the Home Offset field for one Z-axis.
steps.instruction: For one Z-axis, locate the "Home Offset" setting and enter the value recorded in the previous procedure into the "New Value" column.
steps.expected_result: The recorded value is entered into the New Value column for the selected Z-axis Home Offset setting.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct previously recorded Z-axis position value is available and entered into the Home Offset New Value field.
steps.failure_condition: The previously recorded value is not available, or the Home Offset field cannot be located or edited.

actions.label: Enter Home Offset value
actions.exact_action: Locate the "Home Offset" setting and enter the recorded value into the "New Value" column for one Z-axis.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Axis parameter rows and editable machine data fields on the Visu_MDs screen.
Nearby artifact support for the Home Offset entry workflow on the Visu_MDs screen.
Nearby artifact support for the Home Offset entry workflow on the Visu_MDs screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The previously recorded Z-axis position value is not available.
The Home Offset setting or New Value column is not available as described.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby source text references the preceding step to record Z-axis position values for each tipper, then section 7.3.23.8 Set Z-Axis Home Position, where the user navigates to the Visu_MDs screen (F2), enters the recorded Home Offset value in the New Value column for each Z-axis, and presses UPDATE.

steps.title: Confirm the change with UPDATE
steps.purpose: Apply the entered Home Offset value to the selected Z-axis setting.
steps.instruction: Press UPDATE to confirm the change.
steps.expected_result: The entered Home Offset value is confirmed on the HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The UPDATE control is available and the entered value is accepted.
steps.failure_condition: The UPDATE control is not available, or the change cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Press UPDATE
actions.exact_action: Press UPDATE to confirm the change.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Nearby artifact support for the UPDATE control used to confirm the Home Offset change.
Nearby artifact support for the UPDATE control used to confirm the Home Offset change.

stop_or_escalate_if: The UPDATE control is not available as described.
The change cannot be confirmed on the HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby source text states the user enters the recorded Home Offset value in the New Value column for each Z-axis and presses UPDATE.

steps.title: Repeat for the other Z-axis
steps.purpose: Ensure both Z-axes receive their corresponding recorded Home Offset values.
steps.instruction: Repeat the Home Offset entry and UPDATE action for the other Z-axis.
steps.expected_result: Both Z-axes have their recorded Home Offset values entered and confirmed.
steps.healthy_condition: Each Z-axis has its own recorded value entered into Home Offset and confirmed with UPDATE.
steps.failure_condition: The second Z-axis value is unavailable, or the second Home Offset update cannot be completed.

actions.label: Repeat for second Z-axis
actions.exact_action: Repeat the Home Offset entry and UPDATE action for the other Z-axis.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Multiple axis parameter areas on the Visu_MDs screen for applying the same workflow to the other Z-axis.
Nearby artifact support for repeating the Home Offset and UPDATE workflow for each Z-axis.
Nearby artifact support for repeating the Home Offset and UPDATE workflow for each Z-axis.

stop_or_escalate_if: The recorded value for the other Z-axis is not available.
The Home Offset setting, New Value column, or UPDATE control is not available for the other Z-axis.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby source text states the user enters the recorded Home Offset value in the New Value column for each Z-axis and presses UPDATE.

success_criteria: The recorded Z-axis position value is entered as the Home Offset for each Z-axis.
Each Home Offset change is confirmed with UPDATE.
healthy_conditions: The Visu_MDs screen is accessible using F2.
The Home Offset setting and New Value column are available for each Z-axis.
Previously recorded Z-axis position values are available for both Z-axes.
UPDATE is available and accepts each change.
failure_conditions: Previously recorded Z-axis position values are not available.
The Visu_MDs screen is not available.
The Home Offset setting is not available as described.
The New Value column is not available as described.
The UPDATE control is not available as described.
escalation_guidance: Stop and escalate for support if the previously recorded Z-axis position values are not available.
Stop and escalate for support if the Visu_MDs screen, Home Offset setting, New Value column, or UPDATE control is not available as described.
